heading: Arms and ammunition; immunity from taxation
label: 943 Arms and ammunition; immunity from taxation
text: No tax on the sale or transfer of firearms, pistols, revolvers, shells, or cartridges may be imposed on such articles when bought with funds appropriated for the Coast Guard.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 655 of this title1976— struck out “United States” before “Coast Guard”.Pub. L. 94–546
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 655 of this title1976— struck out “United States” before “Coast Guard”.Pub. L. 94–546
